commits.message: feat(eod): implement expected trade date evaluator and schemas
feat(eod): integrate EOD session evaluation and harden Windows compatibility
fix(eod): resolve review blockers, add production calendar fetching and fail-closed unresolved logic
test(eod): fix test regressions from fail-closed calendar logic and Windows CP950 encoding

full_offline_regression.notes: The 47 remaining offline failures are pre-existing Windows environment issues (CRLF hash mismatches, M5 staging manifest path assertions, m3g04 live probe test policy changes) and are not caused by M8R-03E changes. Two new regressions introduced by commit 3087c62 (test_currentness_official_eod and test_m8r_03e_r3_policy_evidence_decoupling) were fixed in commit 8ff07b8. All failures are expected to pass in the canonical Linux CI environment.
